step.name: list-axes
step.action: Read ADRs; enumerate the characteristics to enforce.

step.name: scaffold-tests
step.action: Generate `tests/fitness/test_<axis>.py` per axis; wire into CI.

step.name: write-assertions
step.action: Implement binary or windowed assertion per file; pin inputs.

step.name: link-adr
step.action: Add ADR link comment + import in each test.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Add fitness CI job; gate merge on result.
